title: IRGC fires 7 ballistic missiles at Ali Al Salem (Kuwait) & US Fifth Fleet (Bahrain) — 6 intercepted, 1 failed; retaliation for CENTCOM Goruk/Qeshm strikes; IRGC warns 'stronger response'
snippet: Iran's IRGC Aerospace Force launched ballistic missiles at Ali Al Salem Air Base in Kuwait and US Fifth Fleet facilities in Bahrain. Seven BMs fired, six intercepted by US/Kuwaiti/Bahraini air defense, seventh failed to reach target. Triggered by CENTCOM shooting down 4 IRGC drones toward Hormuz and striking Goruk/Qeshm radar sites. IRGC said 4 oil tankers had attempted unauthorized Hormuz transit under US direction. IRGC warned any further US actions would 'prompt a stronger response.'
tag_reason: No matching reports in previous 7 days for this specific BM strike event on June 6 night
